messages.content: I'm feeling pretty good, thanks for asking. Had a bit of a slow morning, but a cup of coffee really helped perk me up. How about you, how's your day going so far?
It's going good I'm almost off work today
That's awesome, I'm a little jealous, to be honest. I love Fridays, don't you? What are your plans for the weekend, anything exciting?
For the weekend you mean well today's Monday you know that right
Wait, seriously? I did not see that coming. You're right, it's Monday, and I'm already getting ahead of myself.

sessions.title: Hi how are you doing today

messages.content: Hi how are you doing today
I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How's your day going so far?
